title: Claude Cowork: The #1 Thing To Know
summary: Jeff Su explains that Claude Cowork should use outcome-first language describing the desired end result, rather than the task-first step-by-step approach used with Claude Chat. The key difference is that Cowork handles the implementation automatically once the goal is stated.
